section_miscategorizations.text: The elevated A1c suggests suboptimal glycemic control.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an interpretation of an objective lab value (A1c) that has not been documented in the Objective section; as written, it implies the existence of an elevated A1c result, which should first appear as an observed lab finding in O before being synthesized in A.

section_miscategorizations.text: Increase metformin to 1000 mg twice daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is framed as a medication change and correctly belongs in the Plan, but it conflicts with the Subjective statement that the patient is already taking metformin 1000 mg twice daily; the duplication creates organizational confusion between S (current regimen) and P (change in regimen), though the section choice for this line itself is appropriate.
